information from a variety of data sources, 
including the NPPES directory (which has each unique NPI that has been assigned to a provider), the 
Drug Enforcement Administration, and SureScripts (a nationwide e-prescribing network). This variable 
is the primary taxonomy code listed for the prescriber in the NPPES directory. 

This variable corresponds with the PRIMARY_TAXONOMY_CD variable, which provides the taxonomy 
code number associated with this description. There are up to four
